summary: Tested iteration 5: 1) BUG FIX - Story generation 'virtues' parameter verified (function signature now includes virtues param at line 35 of story_service.py), 2) NEW FEATURE - Student Session Join working correctly (UI, API, validation all pass)

minor.issue: FIXED - 'Already joined' response was missing 'title' field, causing toast to show 'undefined'

critical_code_review_comments: virtues parameter fix verified: story_service.py line 35 now has 'virtues: List[str] = []' parameter
server.py line 768 correctly passes virtues=student.get('virtues', []) to generate_story()
Student Session Join UI has proper data-testid attributes for testing
Button disabled state validation uses correct logic: disabled={joiningSession || sessionCode.length < 6}
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 5 tested: 1) Story generation virtues bug fix - the generate_story function now accepts virtues parameter (line 35 of story_service.py), server.py passes it at line 768. 2) Student Session Join feature - fully working with /api/classroom-sessions/join endpoint and StudentAcademy.jsx UI. Students can enter 6-digit session codes to join teacher sessions. Fixed minor bug where 'Already joined' response was missing session title.
